URLs

{% for group, urls in groups.items %}
📦 {{ group }}
{% regroup urls by subgroup as subgroups %} {% for sg in subgroups %}
{% if sg.grouper %}
{{ sg.grouper }} ({{ sg.list|length }})
{% endif %} {% for u in sg.list %}
{{ u.path }}
{% if u.name %}
{{ u.name }}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
